title: sorghum aciculatum
intro: Sorghum aciculatum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sorghum aciculatum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Sorghum aciculatum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
